channel.title: Etcd on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Etcd on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: Announcing etcd v3.7.0
item.description:
etcd v3.7.0 adds RangeStream for chunked range results, improves range/lease/watch performance, and completes the move off legacy v2store dependencies. It also includes protobuf dependency cleanup, Unix socket support, new metrics, and several upgrade-breaking removals.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: k8s: Announcing etcd 3.7.0-beta.0
item.description:
etcd v3.7.0-beta.0 is available. It adds RangeStream for chunked large range responses, removes the remaining etcd v2store code paths, and includes bbolt v1.5.0 and raft v3.7.0.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog
